name: data-grid-view-menu
title: Data Grid View Menu
description: A view menu component for the data grid.

files.content: {#snippet child({ props })} {/snippet} No columns found. {#each columns as column (column.id)} {@const isVisible = isColumnVisible(column.id)} {@const label = column.columnDef.meta?.label ?? column.id} column.toggleVisibility(!isVisible)} > {label} {/each}
